scorecardItems.title: Plot shape is square or rectangular (no irregular/triangular plots)
scorecardItems.complianceBasis: Square/Rectangle = Full marks; Minor irregularity = Partial; Highly irregular = 0

scorecardItems.title: Site slope: North-East lowest, South-West highest
scorecardItems.complianceBasis: Correct slope = Full; Reverse slope = 0; Flat = Partial

scorecardItems.title: North & East sides are lower and more open than South & West sides
Main entry gate located in auspicious Vastu zones
scorecardItems.complianceBasis: In prescribed zone = Full; Nearby zone = Partial; South-West = 0

scorecardItems.title: No entrance in South-West zone
scorecardItems.complianceBasis: No SW entrance = Full marks; SW entrance = 0

scorecardItems.title: Entry gate aligned where highlighted zone meets the road
North-East zone uses (water, lawns, temples, low-rise)
South-West zone heavy buildings & owner functions
South-East zone: Kitchen/restaurant, generator, electrical rooms, fire services
North zone: Retail, offices, club house (no high-rise residential)
East zone: Residential towers, offices, retail (no factories/garbage)
North-West zone: Guest houses, parking, banquet halls (no owner residence/heavy towers)
South-West zone has tallest & heaviest buildings
North-East zone has lowest height and maximum open space
Step-like increase in height from NE to SW (terrace-garden massing)
scorecardItems.complianceBasis: Gradual step = Full; Abrupt = Partial; Inverted = 0

scorecardItems.title: Main approach road from East or North
Internal circulation is clockwise
No T-junction directly hitting any tower
Swimming pool / fountains / water bodies strictly in North-East
Underground water tank / sump in North-East
Overhead water tank in South-West or West
Borewell / tubewell in North-East or East
Basement allowed only in South, West & South-West
scorecardItems.complianceBasis: Only S/W/SW = Full; Mixed = Partial; NE basement = 0

scorecardItems.title: If basement unavoidable in NE, only used for parking with maximum open cut-outs
scorecardItems.complianceBasis: Parking only + open cuts = Partial; Any other use in NE basement = 0

scorecardItems.title: Maximum open lawns, gardens in North-East
scorecardItems.complianceBasis: NE open = Full; Other = Partial; NE built-up = 0

scorecardItems.title: Service areas, garbage rooms, transformers in South-East or North-West (not NE)
Temple / prayer room in North-East zone
Idol facing East or West
Club house located in North-East or North (Acceptable: North-West)
Commercial / retail block on North or East side of the site
scorecardItems.complianceBasis: North/East = Full; Partial elsewhere = 2; SW corner = 0

scorecardItems.title: Electrical room / main panel / transformers in South-East zone
scorecardItems.complianceBasis: SE = Full; East of SE = Partial; NE/Centre = 0

scorecardItems.title: Generator room / DG sets in South-East (Acceptable: North-West)
Fire pump room / fire tanks in South-East (Acceptable: South)
Gas bank / LPG cylinders in South-East only
Sewage Treatment Plant (STP) in North-West or South-East
Septic tank in North-West (Acceptable: West)
Lift machine room / lift shaft in South-West or South (Acceptable: West)
Air-conditioning chiller plant / cooling towers in West or South-West
Pumps / motors (water or fire) in South-East or South
Common toilets in South-East or North-West
No toilet in North-East or Brahmasthan (geometric centre)
scorecardItems.complianceBasis: No NE/Centre toilets = Full; Each violation = -1

scorecardItems.title: Geometric centre is open space or small courtyard only
scorecardItems.complianceBasis: Open = Full; Partial structure = 2; Heavy structure = 0

scorecardItems.title: No construction or heavy structure in the exact centre
North-East extension present (auspicious) or no cuts in NE
scorecardItems.complianceBasis: NE extension = Full; No extension = Partial; Cut in NE = 0

scorecardItems.title: No South-West extension
scorecardItems.complianceBasis: No SW extension = Full; SW extension = 0

scorecardItems.title: SE/NW extension remedies applied (if any)
scorecardItems.complianceBasis: No extension = Full; Extension with remedy = Partial; No remedy = 0

scorecardItems.title: Solar panels on South-facing roof
Rainwater harvesting pits in North-East or along North/East boundary
Meter rooms (electrical) on South-East or along South/West walls
Parking (basement or open) in North-West, South, or West
scorecardItems.complianceBasis: NW/South/West = Full; Heavy basement in NE = 0
